basic_details.job_title: ICAR NBSSLUP Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 13 Assistant, UDC,LDC Posts
basic_details.organization_name: ICAR National Bureau of Soil Survey and Land Use Planning
basic_details.short_information: ICAR National Bureau of Soil Survey and Land Use Planning (ICAR NBSSLUP) Assistant/UDC/LDC Recruitment 2026 Notification has been released on 11 May 2026 on the official website [official website]. A total of 13 vacancies have been announced through the ICAR NBSSLUP Assistant/UDC/LDC Recruitment 2026. Candidates (as per official age limit) who have Graduation/Equivalent, 10 years of regular service in Pay Level-4, 8 years of regular service in PB-I Rs. 5200-20200 + GP Rs. 1900, or 3 years of service in an analogous post are eligible to apply for these Assistant/UDC/LDC vacancies. The offline a

qualification.education_qualification: Graduation/Equivalent, 10 years regular service in Pay Level-4, 8 years regular service in PB-I Rs. 5200-20200 + GP Rs. 1900, 3 years service in analogous post.
qualification.details: Assistant: Holding analogous post on regular basis in parent cadre/department OR Having 10 years regular service in the Pay Level-4 (Rs. 25500-81100) in parent cadre/department. Preference will be given to officials of the ICAR System. Upper Division Clerk: Holding analogous post in the similar capacity OR Lower Division Clerk in the Pay Band PB-I Rs. 5200-20200 + Grade Pay Rs. 1900 with a minimum of 8 years regular service in the Grade. Preference will be given to officials of the ICAR System. Lower Division Clerk: Holding analogous post in the similar capacity with three years of service. Preference will be given to officials of the ICAR System.

salary_details.pay_scale: Pay Level 6, Pay Level 4, Pay Level 2
salary_details.details: Assistant: Pay Level 6 in the pay matrix (Pay band Rs. 9300-34800 + Grade Pay Rs. 4200/- pre-revised) Upper Division Clerk: Pay Level 4 in the pay matrix (Pay Band Rs. 5200-20200 + Grade Pay Rs. 2400/- pre-revised) Lower Division Clerk: Pay Level 2 in the pay matrix (Pay Band Rs. 5200-20200 + Grade Pay Rs. 1900/- pre-revised)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ICAR NBSSLUP Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download ICAR NBSSLUP Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download ICAR NBSSLUP Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICAR NBSSLUP recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline applications for the ICAR NBSSLUP recruitment is 30th June 2026. Candidates are advised to ensure their applications reach the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: A total of 13 vacancies are available for the posts of Assistant, Upper Division Clerk (UDC), and Lower Division Clerk (LDC) in the ICAR National Bureau of Soil Survey and Land Use Planning.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the eligibility criteria for the Assistant post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Assistant post, candidates must be holding an analogous post on a regular basis or have 10 years of regular service in Pay Level-4 in their parent cadre/department. Preference will be given to ICAR system officials.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for the Upper Division Clerk post?
faq.answer: The Upper Division Clerk post offers a salary in Pay Level 4 of the pay matrix, which corresponds to a pre-revised Pay Band of Rs. 5200-20200 with a Grade Pay of Rs. 2400/-.

faq.question: Q6. Are there any application fees for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there are no application fees mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts is based on deputation. Candidates will be selected based on their eligibility and suitability for deputation.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the ICAR NBSSLUP located?
faq.answer: The ICAR National Bureau of Soil Survey and Land Use Planning (ICAR NBSSLUP) is located in Nagpur, Maharashtra, with the pincode 440033.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from other government organizations apply?
faq.answer: Yes, the recruitment is open for deputation amongst officials from ICAR system, central Government, State Government, Union Territories, Autonomous Bodies, or PSUs.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be attached with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant certificates along with the filled application form.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the ICAR NBSSLUP recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline applications for the ICAR NBSSLUP recruitment is 30th June 2026. Candidates are advised to ensure their applications reach the concerned authority before this deadline.
